candidate_formula: S_gauge proportional to [3 Vol(S^3)]^-1 sum_a int Tr(F_a^2) dmu_B
claim_boundary: No located normalized action applies an equal 1/3 frame average to Tr(F_a^2).
evidence_against: the skeleton separates gauge sectors, not Berger frame components, and supplies no factor 1/3
evidence_for: relative gauge kinetic and trace skeletons exist
